evidence-binding: n2-docs 22f6b38d1174

- `docs/opencode-edition.md`: added "Plugin allowlist guard" paragraph to the Hooks section + updated Verification to list A11-allowlist assertion.
- `docs/decisions/D-578-01.md`: created ADR recording the set-equality guard (installer glob ≡ PLUGIN_SCRIPTS), opencode-edition-only scope, RED-first A11-allowlist test, and rationale for guard-in-check over changing the installer glob.
